charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Generate a fake dataset

Source: R/generate.R
ch_generate.Rd

Generate a fake dataset

ch_generate(..., n = 10, locale = NULL)

Arguments

...

columns to include. must be in the allowed set. See Allowed column names below. Three default columns are included (name, job, phone_number) if nothing is specified - but are overridden by any input.
n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer
locale

(character) the locale to use. options: only supported for data types that have locale support, See each data provider for details.

Allowed column names

  • name (default included)

  • job (default included)

  • phone_number (default included)

  • currency

  • color_name

  • rgb_color

  • rgb_css_color

Examples

ch_generate()

#> # A tibble: 10 x 3
#>    name                       job                              phone_number     
#>    <chr>                      <chr>                            <chr>            
#>  1 Josue Schmeler             Textile designer                 1-069-773-3695   
#>  2 Ashleigh Carroll-O'Connell Designer, jewellery              1-096-905-6674   
#>  3 Winston Simonis            Broadcast journalist             161.746.7763x9811
#>  4 Valentin Brown             Education administrator          03988086481      
#>  5 Hill Goyette IV            Freight forwarder                581.753.6857     
#>  6 Vinson Thiel-Lebsack       Geophysical data processor       291-948-8498x3522
#>  7 Mr. Johnpaul Conn IV       Engineer, maintenance            07055355406      
#>  8 Dakotah Heidenreich-Cole   Public house manager             860.364.8455     
#>  9 Wilfred Rolfson            Designer, television/film set    07952379645      
#> 10 Rodrick Casper III         Scientific laboratory technician 867.171.4931     
ch_generate(n = 1)

#> # A tibble: 1 x 3
#>   name                 job                        phone_number     
#>   <chr>                <chr>                      <chr>            
#> 1 Nicola Hand-Gottlieb Regulatory affairs officer 679.269.6127x4980
ch_generate(n = 100)

#> # A tibble: 100 x 3
#>    name                      job                              phone_number      
#>    <chr>                     <chr>                            <chr>             
#>  1 Camryn Hoeger             Product designer                 176.736.7236x47496
#>  2 Mr. Matt Schmitt          Publishing copy                  +50(4)4654282246  
#>  3 Davon Stamm               Office manager                   04213556388       
#>  4 Killian Hickle            Hydrologist                      222.282.5876x6421 
#>  5 Dr. Tracie Wisoky MD      Surveyor, minerals               (868)860-6914     
#>  6 Tracie Cummings PhD       Furniture conservator/restorer   1-923-556-3623    
#>  7 Irwin Lindgren            Operations geologist             03640119685       
#>  8 Mrs. Laverne Runolfsson … Chief Marketing Officer          (393)358-8715x024…
#>  9 Kelly Mueller             Research officer, political par… +64(5)3004564172  
#> 10 Ms. Luella Lindgren       Investment analyst               626-167-7520      
#> # … with 90 more rows

ch_generate('job')

#> # A tibble: 10 x 1
#>    job                               
#>    <chr>                             
#>  1 Secretary/administrator           
#>  2 Teacher, special educational needs
#>  3 Systems developer                 
#>  4 Regulatory affairs officer        
#>  5 Tourism officer                   
#>  6 Futures trader                    
#>  7 Information officer               
#>  8 Chief Marketing Officer           
#>  9 Educational psychologist          
#> 10 Surveyor, building                
ch_generate('job', 'name')

#> # A tibble: 10 x 2
#>    job                               name                       
#>    <chr>                             <chr>                      
#>  1 Planning and development surveyor Shasta Green               
#>  2 Scientist, marine                 Helaine Breitenberg PhD    
#>  3 Runner, broadcasting/film/video   Taylor Fadel               
#>  4 Intelligence analyst              Hester Reichert-Lemke      
#>  5 Designer, interior/spatial        Keyon Mante-Macejkovic     
#>  6 Engineer, materials               Burleigh Gutkowski-Turcotte
#>  7 Multimedia specialist             Brantley Mayert            
#>  8 Quantity surveyor                 Dr. Caroline Paucek        
#>  9 Haematologist                     Ms. Blanchie Boyle MD      
#> 10 Ranger/warden                     Tobin Williamson           
ch_generate('job', 'color_name')

#> # A tibble: 10 x 2
#>    job                        color_name      
#>    <chr>                      <chr>           
#>  1 Lecturer, higher education Cyan            
#>  2 Psychologist, counselling  LavenderBlush   
#>  3 Designer, textile          Wheat           
#>  4 Surveyor, insurance        Red             
#>  5 Art therapist              Turquoise       
#>  6 Futures trader             LightPink       
#>  7 Psychologist, clinical     SpringGreen     
#>  8 Engineer, electrical       MediumAquaMarine
#>  9 Building services engineer BurlyWood       
#> 10 Rural practice surveyor    Gold            

# locale
ch_generate(locale = "en_US")

#> # A tibble: 10 x 3
#>    name                      job                              phone_number      
#>    <chr>                     <chr>                            <chr>             
#>  1 Mrs. Liddie Ferry         Scientist, water quality         1-040-344-8639x637
#>  2 Lakeshia Goldner          Radiation protection practition… 193.662.9668x201  
#>  3 Vicy Runolfsson           Scientist, water quality         450-907-3116      
#>  4 Jakobe Bernier-Bechtelar  Arts development officer         526-716-3354x4953 
#>  5 Mr. Carsen Rice I         Community development worker     986.194.0577      
#>  6 Franklin Jaskolski        Restaurant manager               1-413-830-5640x641
#>  7 Zain Jerde                Engineer, site                   1-583-762-8816x922
#>  8 Selah Mitchell-Powlowski  Naval architect                  706.425.5896x99245
#>  9 Garnett Reilly            Interior and spatial designer    1-342-749-3114x54…
#> 10 Mrs. Mellisa Abernathy D… Arts administrator               436.569.2271x54571
ch_generate(locale = "fr_FR")

#> # A tibble: 10 x 3
#>    name                  job                                  phone_number      
#>    <chr>                 <chr>                                <chr>             
#>  1 Antoine L'Chauvet     Secrétaire administratif             +33 4 12 72 45 49 
#>  2 Jérôme Vallee         Mixeur                               +33 (0)6 36 88 45…
#>  3 Odette Lefévre        Technicien en lignes haute tension   +33 (0)1 48 56 99…
#>  4 Jeanne Bruneau d'Bes… Auditeur externe                     +33 1 97 48 86 92 
#>  5 Alix-Isabelle Hubért  Reporter-photographe                 +33 1 81 52 42 59 
#>  6 Astrid d'Picard       Dessinateur de BD                    01 41 60 78 98    
#>  7 Daniel-Émile Dijoux   Visiteur                             0898945171        
#>  8 Daniel Marié          Brodeur                              +33 4 95 79 07 18 
#>  9 Simone-Danielle Méun… Agent de la surveillance SNCF        0423219482        
#> 10 Gabriel Lemonnier     Chef d'exploitation d'usine d'incin… 04 06 85 72 07    
ch_generate(locale = "fr_CH")

#> # A tibble: 10 x 3
#>    name           job                                            phone_number   
#>    <chr>          <chr>                                          <chr>          
#>  1 Lisa Joye      Spécialiste de la sécurité dans les instituti… 044 884 67 62  
#>  2 Luca Francill… Responsable de la communication diplomé        045 730 51 92  
#>  3 Jean Brahier   éducateur de l'enfance diplômé. ES             +41 84 446 84 …
#>  4 Alexandre Pol… Electroplaste avec brevet fédéral              +41 31 967 79 …
#>  5 Jacqueline Ba… Plâtrier-peintre                               0901 787 509   
#>  6 Jacques Cosan… Conseiller en environnement avec brevet feder… +41 (0)56 569 …
#>  7 Madeleine Mus… Professeur de golf avec brevet fédéral         +41 37 964 51 …
#>  8 Thérèse Peitr… Coordinateur en médecine ambulatoire orientat… 0843 326 968   
#>  9 Ana Brahier    Contremaître maçon avec brevet fédéral         095 643 54 30  
#> 10 Alain Cattin   Tôlier en carrosserie avec brevet fédéral      032 644 76 46
